summary: SINGLE_FOCUS NumberPlane: maximize f=xy on unit circle g=x²+y²=1 via Lagrange. BLUE circle + TEAL hyperbolic level curves of f. ValueTracker theta_tr moves YELLOW point around circle; always_redraw GREEN ∇f=(y, x) arrow + ORANGE ∇g=2(x, y) arrow + RED hollow marker when ∇f ∥ ∇g. Live (x, y), f, df/dθ = cos(2θ) zeros at optima.
